title: Backend Not Receiving Traffic
page: app is erroring on every backend call since this morning's network maintenance. the backend team swears their service is healthy - and their logs agree: no traffic is arriving at all.
hints: The backend really is healthy. So if the app's requests are failing, where are they actually going? Trace one from inside the app container.

How does the app resolve the name 'backend'? /etc/hosts wins over DNS - check it inside the app container. (It's a docker bind mount: sed -i and vi can't rename over it, so rewrite it in place with a redirect.)
